title: plantago psyllium subsp. stricta
intro: Plantago psyllium subsp. stricta, also known as strict leaf plantain, is a subspecies of the plantain plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is a herbaceous perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various gastrointestinal issues, including constipation and diarrhea, due to its high content of soluble fiber. The medicinal properties of Plantago psyllium subsp. stricta are attributed to its ability to absorb and retain water, forming a gel-like substance that helps to soften and move stool through the digestive system, providing several health benefits such as regulating bowel movements and promoting digestive regularity. Plantago psyllium subsp. stricta can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, allowing individuals to incorporate its medicinal properties into their daily routine.
